Event: Royal Challenge - Season 44
Event Date: 01/12/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: AM283
Polar Halo

Once in a while, the unit removes 4 random negative effects from self and all allied units in a small radius around, and reduces the damage they take by 40% for 4 sec. The unit also removes 4 random positive effects from a random enemy unit and all enemy units in a small radius around that unit, and increases the damage they take by 40% for 4 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet

Event: Royal Challenge - Season 44

Event date: 01/12/2025

Sage bot code: AM283

First trigger: 5 sec

Cooldown: 9 secs
